description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel. The stock is made of a medium-brown wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a sturdy and ergonomic grip. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with the barrel being notably long and straight, suitable for precision shooting. A telescopic scope is mounted on top of the receiver, indicating the rifle is designed for long-range accuracy. The trigger guard and bolt handle are visible, both made of metal, and the rifle lacks any visible external magazine, suggesting an internal magazine or single-shot design. The overall appearance is that of a traditional hunting or sporting rifle, with a focus on durability and precision.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and mounted telescopic scope, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_1: The rifle is shown in side profile, clearly displaying the wooden stock, long barrel, mounted scope, and metal receiver.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the butt end, highlighting the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile of the rifle, again showing the wooden stock, long barrel, and scope, with minor details of the bolt and trigger visible.
